text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm… What song should I pick 
for my singing lessons…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The teacher said it's fine to just pick a song 
I like, but I don't know any popular songs…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Songs I like, huh… What about 
"LOVE & TURF"? Mom used to 
sing it all the time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She said Mama really liked it too… 
All right, I'll do that song!
